vision: A mobile application that provides individuals with a single, simple location to capture and manage personal tasks, reducing cognitive load and helping users focus on getting things done.

epics.name: Task Creation
epics.description: Enable users to quickly capture new tasks with essential details, providing a frictionless way to add items as they arise.

stories.title: Create task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a new task with a title, so that I can capture items I need to do.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button and enter a title and confirm Then a new task appears in my task list with the entered title
Given I am creating a new task When I leave the title field empty and try to confirm Then the task is not created and I see a validation message
stories.notes: Foundation feature for the entire app

stories.title: Add optional due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to add an optional due date when creating a task, so that I can track when items need to be completed.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a new task When I tap on the due date field Then I can select a date from a date picker
Given I am creating a new task When I do not select a due date and confirm Then the task is created without a due date displayed
stories.notes: Date picker should be native to platform

epics.name: Task Completion
epics.description: Allow users to mark tasks as complete, providing satisfaction from tracking progress and finishing items.

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress and see what I have accomplished.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I tap the completion checkbox on an incomplete task Then the task is visually marked as complete
Given a task is marked as complete When I view the task list Then the completed task appears with a strikethrough or visual distinction

stories.title: Unmark task as incomplete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to unmark a completed task, so that I can restore it to my active list if completed by mistake.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing a completed task When I tap the completion checkbox Then the task is restored to incomplete status
Given a task is unmarked as incomplete When I view the task list Then the task no longer shows completed visual styling

epics.name: Task Deletion
epics.description: Enable users to remove tasks from their list, keeping the task view clean and relevant.

stories.title: Delete task from list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task from my list, so that I can remove items that are no longer relevant.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I perform the delete action on a task Then the task is removed from the list
Given I am about to delete a task When I initiate the delete action Then I see a confirmation prompt before the task is permanently removed

epics.name: Task List Viewing
epics.description: Provide users with a clear, scrollable view of all their tasks to maintain visibility of what needs to be done.

stories.title: View all tasks in list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a scrollable list, so that I can see everything I need to do at a glance.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created multiple tasks When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a vertical scrollable list
Given I have more tasks than fit on screen When I scroll the list Then I can access all tasks above and below the visible area

stories.title: View empty state message
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to see a helpful message when I have no tasks, so that I understand the list is empty and know how to add tasks.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have no tasks When I view the task list Then I see a message indicating no tasks exist
Given I see the empty state When I look at the screen Then I see guidance or a prompt to create my first task

epics.name: Task Filtering
epics.description: Allow users to filter their task view to focus on incomplete or completed items based on their current needs.

stories.title: Filter to show incomplete tasks only
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my list to show only incomplete tasks, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I select the incomplete filter Then only incomplete tasks are displayed
Given I am viewing filtered incomplete tasks When a task exists that is marked complete Then that task is hidden from view

stories.title: Filter to show completed tasks only
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter my list to show only completed tasks, so that I can review what I have accomplished.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I select the completed filter Then only completed tasks are displayed
Given I am viewing filtered completed tasks When a task exists that is incomplete Then that task is hidden from view

stories.title: Clear filter to show all tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to clear my filter and view all tasks, so that I can return to the full list view.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an active filter applied When I select the all tasks option Then both complete and incomplete tasks are displayed
Given I clear the filter When I view the list Then the filter selection shows all tasks as the active view

epics.name: Data Persistence
epics.description: Ensure user tasks are saved locally and persist across app sessions, enabling reliable offline usage.

stories.title: Persist tasks locally on device
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my tasks to be saved on my device, so that I do not lose my data when I close the app.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I close and reopen the app Then all my previously created tasks are still visible
Given I have marked tasks as complete When I close and reopen the app Then the completion status is preserved

stories.title: Use app offline without connectivity
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to use the app without internet connectivity, so that I can manage tasks anywhere.
acceptance_criteria: Given my device has no internet connection When I create a new task Then the task is saved successfully
Given my device has no internet connection When I mark a task complete or delete it Then the action completes successfully
